summary: The mandibular fossa forms an articulation with the condyle of the mandible within the zygomatic arch area but it belongs specifically under components related to the structure formed by the joint between these elements which are primarily from the temporal bone forming the middle cranial fossa. It plays no direct role among options like maxillary sinus cavity walls etc., rather its primary function lies anatomically speaking inside this complex framework involving multiple facial skeletal
